posts.title: The United States has the most progressive tax system in the world. The top 1% pay 40% of taxes, the bottom 50% pay 3% of taxes. We can make it even more progressive by ZEROING OUT TAXES ON THE BOTTOM HALF. It’s a small amount of the total tax revenue but very meaningful to people in this group.

posts.raw_content:
Salon has a story about Matt Walsh's new movie on Rosa Parks.

I expected them to be upset and claim it isn't true that it was staged.

No. Their argument is basically, "Yes, but so what. Lots of people know."

Um, my history textbook back in the day made it sound like it was a spontaneous act of defiance. Not that it really matters now, but still.
